economic_notes: Tsawout First Nation holds a 20% investment in a Government Business Enterprise. As at March 31, 2018 (latest available), shareholders equity was $254,131 and net income was $111,645. Two inactive corporations: Stautw Property Development Corp. and Tkian Development Corp.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to an unaudited Government Business Enterprise (20% ownership) whose financial information was not made available during the audit. The investment has not been recorded in financial statements. Last available financials for the GBE were from March 31, 2018 prepared under IFRS. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC, Health Canada, and Government of Canada transfers (2,769,475 + 1,230,067 + 1,961,531 = 5,961,073 government transfers; remaining 4,414,557 includes property tax, rentals, other, deferred revenue adjustments, and funding recoveries). Ottawa Trust Funds of $519,856 shown separately on balance sheet. Replacement Reserves of $1,639,728 on balance sheet.
